name: Actoris Fresnel
comment: Step into the next generation of lighting technology with Actoris Fresnel from ADB by Claypaky. Designed for broadcast, film, and theatre, it is an essential addition to our renowned Multispectral range, setting new standards in lighting quality and color precision. Featuring a powerful 6-color RGBAL + Royal Blue LED engine and an impressive CRI of up to 97, this fixture delivers exceptional color fidelity and breathtaking, lifelike velvet-smooth hues. Whether you’re looking for a soft wash or dynamic spot effects, Actoris Fresnel ensures versatility, flawless dimming, and unmatched control with a range of customizable options.
